jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Cuemath
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? Cuemath in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cuemath:
Cuemath is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath!
